subcodes.first_line: O thou whom the Youth calleth from His prison! Verily there have been sent down unto thee aforetime clear verses, and these are indeed a remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الذی یدعوک الغلام فی سجنه قد نزلت لک من قبل آیات بینات و انها لذکری
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment
